title: Numbers At Most N Given Digit Set
hints: Split the count into two parts: numbers with fewer digits than n, and numbers with the same number of digits as n.
For the first part, use the length of digits to calculate powers. For the second, process n digit by digit from left to right.
When matching digits of n, add counts for smaller valid digits, then decide whether to continue or stop based on the current digit's presence in digits.
